noticia.titulo: Anathema: Spec from the Margins Relaunches
noticia.texto_resumido: Anathema : Spec from the Margins , a speculative fiction magazine by and for queer people of color, has announced that it is relaunching after a four-year hiatus. We're committed to supporting marginalized writers by paying them a professional rate for their work. To feature up to 4 stories, 4 poems, and 1 nonfiction piece per issue, we plan to pay: $0.08/word for fiction up to 6,000 words $0.05/word …Read More
